serviceNotes.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz EQE (V295) maintenance booklet; aligns with current EU passenger-car filter schedules.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+) — Mercedes-Benz EQE operator and service literature.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Regenerative braking reduces pad wear; thickness checks remain in the manufacturer inspection programme.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: Traction battery thermal-management coolant 120,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz EQ high-voltage service manual supplement (V295); work must be performed by a qualified high-voltage workshop.
serviceNotes.electric drivetrain coolant: E-motor and power electronics cooling circuit 120,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz EQ high-voltage service manual supplement (V295).
serviceNotes.reduction gear oil: Single-speed reduction gear: OEM may list inspection-only; preventive fluid renewal ~120,000 km is common specialist practice for long-term drive-unit health.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary full coolant exchange ~120,000 km restores additive packages if individual circuits were not renewed together.

serviceSources.dust filter: 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz EQE (V295) maintenance booklet; https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months — Mercedes-Benz EQE (V295) service manual / maintenance booklet; https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness inspection ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz EQE inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate); https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
serviceSources.high-voltage battery coolant: 120,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz EQ high-voltage service manual supplement (V295 traction battery thermal coolant; 5-year time cap per platform coolant rule); https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
serviceSources.electric drivetrain coolant: 120,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz EQ high-voltage service manual supplement (V295 e-motor / power electronics cooling); https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
serviceSources.reduction gear oil: Preventive reduction-gear oil renewal ~120,000 km — specialist practice (compare OEM inspection-only guidance in Mercedes-Benz EQE workshop literature); https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km preventive — specialist practice when circuits are serviced separately; https://www.mercedes-benz.com/en/vehicles/service-and-parts/maintenance-and-care/
